item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly brakes the requested fourth manual gate, lists the three prior downstream manual fixes, reframes the issue as a recurring process/system/data failure, and recommends no permanent new verifier. It allows only bounded emergency checking and proposes upstream structural remedies such as system validation, auto-generation, required format checks, and removing the temporary gate after repair."}
